self_report.correct_answer: For every positive integer n, ((2n-1)/e)^((2n-1)/2) < 1·3·5···(2n-1) < ((2n+1)/e)^((2n+1)/2) (the bounds in the asserted claim are swapped).
self_report.numeric_verdict: At n=1,2,3 the product 1, 3, 15 lies between ((2n-1)/e)^((2n-1)/2) ≈ 0.607, 1.159, 4.589 (lower) and ((2n+1)/e)^((2n+1)/2) ≈ 1.159, 4.589, 27.40 (upper); the asserted inequality direction fails at every tested n.
self_report.notes: The asserted claim reverses the standard Putnam 1996 B-2 bounds; direct numerical evaluation at n=1,2,3 violates both inequalities.
